fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the measured path between the specified distances and appends it to a path builder.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if a non-empty segment was successfully appended to <paramref name="dst" />; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.stop: The distance along the path at which the segment ends.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the extracted path segment.
params.start: The distance along the path at which the segment starts.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to start the segment with a move-to at the first point; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
